name: Datetime Picker
summary: A named shallow preset over the abstract `temporal` core: a combined date-and-time picker. It pins the Temporal Intent to presentation=media and granularity=point, bound to the native <input type="datetime-local"> anchor — one control that selects both a calendar date and a time. It composes the core's calendar + clock surfaces and inherits locale-aware parse/format and keyboard roving; the native datetime-local input is the zero-JS fallback.
designDecisions: A preset is a dimension pin, not new machinery (#713 option C) — datetime-picker pins presentation=media + granularity=point over input[type=datetime-local]. It is the third distinct native anchor (after date and time) that makes the temporal family a set of named presets rather than one configurable block (#713 C; the single-anchor slider precedent).

input[type=datetime-local] is the anchor and fallback; the picker composes the core's date (calendar) and time (clock) media surfaces over the one native control, which stays the keyboard/no-JS baseline.

ariaApgKeyboard.usage: A combined date-and-time preset: native `<input type="datetime-local">` or a composed calendar + clock surface.
